introSection:
Flying Aces is a steel roller coaster located at Ferrari World Abu Dhabi in Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates.

A zipline is being erected which passes through the middle of the non inverting loop. It reopened on 5 November 2020.

sections.title: Design
sections.content:
Flying Aces is a Wing Coaster model from Intamin, similar to Skyrush at Hersheypark. The ride has white track and supports.

In January 2017, the ride's restraints were changed from overhead lap bars to over-the-shoulder restraints.

fullText:
Flying Aces is a steel roller coaster located at Ferrari World Abu Dhabi in Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates.

A zipline is being erected which passes through the middle of the non inverting loop. It reopened on 5 November 2020.

Flying Aces is a Wing Coaster model from Intamin, similar to Skyrush at Hersheypark. The ride has white track and supports.

In January 2017, the ride's restraints were changed from overhead lap bars to over-the-shoulder restraints.
